title: Text Processing (Windows)
description: Perintah untuk memproses dan memanipulasi teks di CMD dan PowerShell.

commands.name: findstr-text
commands.title: findstr — Pencarian Teks dengan Regex
commands.description: Tool pencarian teks utama di CMD, mendukung regex dan multi-file.
commands.examples:
# Cari teks
findstr "error" *.log

# Case insensitive + nomor baris
findstr /i /n "warning" app.log

# Regex: cari IP address
findstr /r "[0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*" access.log

# Cari di semua subdirektori
findstr /s /i "password" *.txt *.cfg

# Baris yang tidak mengandung
findstr /v "DEBUG" app.log

commands.name: sort-win
commands.title: sort — Mengurutkan Teks
commands.description: Mengurutkan baris teks dari file atau input.
commands.examples:
# Urutkan file
sort data.txt

# Urutan terbalik
sort /r data.txt

# Simpan ke file
sort data.txt /o sorted.txt

# Pipe dari perintah
type names.txt | sort

# PowerShell: Sort-Object
Get-Content data.txt | Sort-Object
Get-Content data.txt | Sort-Object -Descending
Get-Content data.txt | Sort-Object -Unique

commands.name: select-string-ps
commands.title: Select-String — Grep PowerShell
commands.description: Cmdlet PowerShell untuk pencarian teks yang sangat powerful. Setara dengan grep di Linux.

options.description: Tampilkan n baris sebelum dan sesudah

commands.examples:
# Cari teks
Select-String -Path *.log -Pattern "error"

# Dengan konteks
Select-String -Path app.log -Pattern "exception" -Context 3,3

# Rekursif
Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.txt | Select-String "TODO"

# Case sensitive
Select-String -Path *.cs -Pattern "className" -CaseSensitive

# Multiple patterns
Select-String -Path *.log -Pattern "error|warning|critical"

# Hitung kemunculan
(Select-String -Path *.log -Pattern "error").Count

commands.name: powershell-text
commands.title: PowerShell Text Cmdlets
commands.description: Berbagai cmdlet PowerShell untuk manipulasi teks tingkat lanjut.
commands.examples:
# Replace teks
(Get-Content file.txt) -replace 'lama', 'baru' | Set-Content file.txt

# Split dan proses
Get-Content csv.txt | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split ',')[0] }

# Filter unik
Get-Content names.txt | Sort-Object -Unique

# Hitung baris / kata / karakter
(Get-Content file.txt | Measure-Object -Line -Word -Character)

# Konversi case
"hello world".ToUpper()
"HELLO".ToLower()

# Format output
Get-Process | Format-Table Name, CPU -AutoSize
Get-Process | Select-Object Name, CPU | Export-Csv proses.csv
